channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-30 05:18 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok is officially the ultimate wingman 😂 Stop embarrassing yourself trying to decode mixed signals....
item.description: Grok is officially the ultimate wingman 😂 Stop embarrassing yourself trying to decode mixed signals. Run those texts through Grok first.....it tells you the honest truth whenever you need to hear it You need an AI built for the real world. Grok never disappoints because it’s actually grounded in reality

item.title: @elonmusk: Here's how fast the internet is using Starlink while flying over the Gulf of America. This stuff is ...
item.description: Here's how fast the internet is using Starlink while flying over the Gulf of America. This stuff is incredible.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work
item.description: Grok automatically translating and recommending 𝕏 posts from other languages is starting to work

item.title: @elonmusk: Catherine Bracy, founder of the nonprofit Tech Equity, interviewed Sam Altman years ago about OpenAI...
item.description: Catherine Bracy, founder of the nonprofit Tech Equity, interviewed Sam Altman years ago about OpenAI being a nonprofit and his decision-making. Her conclusion: “Every day that OpenAI exists, they are violating the law.”

item.title: @elonmusk: Elevators used to be manually operated and were especially risky if the operator was tired or inebri...
item.description: Elevators used to be manually operated and were especially risky if the operator was tired or inebriated. Now, you just get in, press a button and a modern elevator, if inspected regularly, is extremely safe.

item.title: @elonmusk: Two riders experiencing@TeslaFSD Unsupervised yesterday in Austin for the first time. "Woowwww, that...
item.description: Two riders experiencing@TeslaFSD Unsupervised yesterday in Austin for the first time. "Woowwww, that's awesome. Look at this thing man! Inches out and then goes. Crazy; Allows this car to park, it stops, gives it room for it to park. Nice."

item.title: @elonmusk: The largest cultural exchange in history just dropped.
item.description: The largest cultural exchange in history just dropped.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grokの自動翻訳によって日本のX好きが世界に急速にバレ始めています...！ このポストもきっとバレるので、みなさんがなぜXを使っているのかを、リプライか引用ポストで教えてください。世界規模で意見交換...
item.description: Grokの自動翻訳によって日本のX好きが世界に急速にバレ始めています...！ このポストもきっとバレるので、みなさんがなぜXを使っているのかを、リプライか引用ポストで教えてください。世界規模で意見交換できるかも🌎️

item.title: @elonmusk: このアプリは絶対に消さない
item.description: このアプリは絶対に消さない

item.title: @elonmusk: Only with Grok understanding every language and recommending content can this be done. This has been...
item.description: Only with Grok understanding every language and recommending content can this be done. This has been a long-time goal.
